tactical_branch_base: Home territorial control against compact away block.
danger_branch: 0-0 after 60' or away transition/set-piece keeps draw alive.
market_do_not_overstretch: Avoid handicap/goleada; unit-weighted layer suppresses blowout path unless early goal + sustained xG pressure confirms.
first_half_script: Home control, away compact; first goal value high; HT likely 0-0 or 1-0.
second_half_script: If home scores first, game management; if 0-0 after 60', draw branch rises sharply.
impact_adjustment_note: Forecast adjusted by unit-weighted team index: player roles + team production + style context.
note: Full match projection derived from ad hoc fixture forecast, official/estimated XI, market-implied probabilities, team style and unit-weighted player-impact weighting. Diagnostic only; not a betting instruction.
